name: list_comments
description: List comments on a Linear issue, project, initiative, document, or project milestone. Provide exactly one of `issueId`, `projectId`, `initiativeId`, `documentId`, or `milestoneId`. For issues, projects, and initiatives this returns both top-level discussion threads and inline description comments. Inline (anchored) comments carry a non-null `quotedText` set to the snippet of description text they reference.

issueId.description: Issue ID or identifier (e.g., LIN-123) (provide exactly one parent)

projectId.description: Project name, ID, or slug (provide exactly one parent)

initiativeId.description: Initiative name or ID (provide exactly one parent)

documentId.description: Document ID or slug (provide exactly one parent)

milestoneId.description: Milestone UUID (provide exactly one parent). Resolve milestone names via `list_milestones` first.
